Use your scanner to document the planet's ecosystem

Kindex progress: {progress} %

I have been sent to this world with the goal of discovering whether it is fit for human habitation. Using the latest in Kindred Science I must scan the world and build out a database for transmission to Kindred.

REWARD: Unlock More Upgrades

HQ is requesting that I perform the following science experiments:

-{sample} Live Samples: Gather live samples from Pufferbird, Baboushka and Pikemander.
-{alpha} Nuke It: Kill 4 creatures with a single Alpha Pufferbird detonation.
-{fall} Safety First: Fall 50 meters and save yourself with the Jump Thrusters.
-{inair} Flight Risk: Kill 5 ground creatures while they are airborne.
-{scan} Use your scanner to document at least {surv_req} % of the planet's ecosystem

It doesn't seem too complex: Get out the Live Sample tool, sneak up behind some unsuspecting critter and then stick them with it. I hope it is painless. There should be more documentation for this kind of thing.

Another one of those alien teleporters beckons. The first gave me strange visions and I am worried about the long term impact of this on my physiology. That said, Kindred should be able to perform a genetic purge when I return to Earth, so everything should be fine?
